reasons.persona: Monday 10:30 dashboard scene and analogies (房東調租金, 辯論賽, 精品咖啡店官網) land, but effort-ladder and infra-changes sections slide back into explanation mode rather than LHY lecture voice.
reasons.clawdNote: All four ClawdNotes carry clear stance — 'prompt 偷懶的人痛苦', 'tokenizer 偷偷換這件事蠻缺德的', 'CLAUDE.md 的第一頁寫死', passes the opinion-threshold at 8.
reasons.vibe: Monday incident hook pulls you in, but the middle enumerates three 同謀 + five effort tiers + three infra changes back-to-back; engineers would bookmark it, non-engineers wouldn't share.
reasons.clarity: Body text consistently names subjects (team lead / harness / team / Anthropic), pronoun 你/我 appears only inside ClawdNote where Clawd is the clear speaker.
reasons.narrative: 週一 event opens and the final section callbacks to it with a postmortem, but the middle stays in '先講第一個同謀、再第二個、再第三個、然後 effort 五階梯、再三個 infra 改動' enumerative rhythm — strip test = release notes with a story wrapper.
